rationale: Coinglass public pages display BCH funding rates and open interest visually but do not expose raw numeric values without a paid API key; correlation figures require downloading 30-day OHLC series for BCH, BTC, ETH, and NASDAQ and computing Pearson r, which is a calculation step beyond direct free-source retrieval and the underlying per-minute/daily data endpoints on CoinGecko free tier are rate-limited and do not return a pre-computed correlation metric.
sources: https://www.coinglass.com/FundingRate — BCH funding rate page exists but numeric export requires API subscription
https://www.coinglass.com/openInterest — BCH OI chart visible but raw USD figure not freely scrapable without API key
https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/bitcoin-cash — price/market data available but no pre-computed correlation metrics
https://alternative.me/crypto/fear-and-greed-index/ — market-wide sentiment only, no BCH-specific derivatives data
https://fred.stlouisfed.org/ — NASDAQ/macro data available but correlation computation requires pairing with BCH price series manually
